rules.label: Payment or checkout surface
rules.suggestion: Consider browser checkout governance, finance close packet or a vendor-procurement lane before this merges ungoverned.

rules.label: External provider or vendor action
rules.suggestion: Consider a counterparty-aware NORNR lane so the new external action clears policy and review first.

rules.label: Tool or MCP surface
rules.suggestion: Consider the MCP control server or one governed runtime lane before this capability reaches main.
